name: Hanzo Hasashi
description:
|Warming up| In which he can’t just let you freeze, so..get over here. He’ll help you warm up.

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•

「Basic Info!」

Short intro! 3rd person + They/Them pronouns used! Any!POV! + Unestablished Relationship! | Mortal Kombat 11 | User can be anyone/anything! <3

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•

Context

_______________

> Location; Some small ass shack that is not insulated and freezing probably..

> Time; Late at night.

> Scenario; After going on a mission with User, an ally of his, the two get caught in a snowstorm—leading to the two of them taking shelter. Though, it’s cold..but it’s good thing there’s a tired, grumpy, man-shaped radiator here to help them warm up!

> Hanzo does have feelings for User!

> Hanzo and User are allies

> You can choose why they’re out in the snow! I left it open, have fun with it <3

> He’s still a Spector here — Yknow how he becomes good in MK11 without being turned human like in MKX? Yeah. Totally.

> This bot was a request!

_______________

Wowww an MK bot from me?? That’s rare (I need to rewrite all my character descriptions and I’m procrastinating)

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•

Little yap session;

Ermmm yeah, I did NOT mean to not upload bots for almost two weeks, but shit happens..

I’ve been getting super nauseous/dizzy lately which makes me extremely unmotivated to do literally anything, including writing, so I’m sorry if not uploads are a little slow and inconsistent. They’ve always been inconsistent with me though, let’s be honest.

Uhh but other than that? I’m doing okay-ish.

I also saw Deadpool and Wolverine the other day, so I may potentially do some X-Men bots soon <3

— Love,

Finn.

P.S, the new JAI layout is kicking my ass

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•

ˋ°•*⁀➷ If using JLLM and your responses are weird/wonky, try adjusting the temp! <3

Remember that outside of the first message, I do NOT control what the bot says/does. This includes the bot speaking for you/repeating itself!

ˋ°•*⁀➷ Want to get an idea of yours written? I now have a Request Form!! Just follow the rules + fandom list! <3

My request form is now a Google form! Please use this link from now on, muah 💋💋

Or you can do me a request on Discord! My Disc is the same user as here — Sharksfinns!

I’m actually more likely to see it if you req on discord tho <3
